site.title: christhoma · Courses
site.tagline: Self-paced, deep-dive courses on building things that matter.
site.author: christhoma

courses.title: Agentic Harness Engineering
courses.subtitle: CS 2960 · A 3-week graduate-style intensive
courses.description: Master the architecture of modern AI agent harnesses — the loop, tools, context, security, and evaluation — by building one from scratch and tearing down the production ones.

courses.title: Applied Music Theory for Guitar
courses.subtitle: MUS-21G · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Master practical music theory entirely on the fretboard — intervals, scales, chord construction, Roman numeral analysis, minor keys, blues, and modes — through daily lectures, drills, quizzes, and composition projects.

courses.title: Foundations of Photography & the Digital Camera
courses.subtitle: PHOT-10 · A 3-week intensive
courses.description: Go from Auto to intentional — the exposure triangle, focus, reading and using light, the grammar of composition, color, and a complete RAW editing workflow — through daily lectures, shooting assignments, quizzes, and projects. Tailored to the Fujifilm X100VI.
